introSection: Silver Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France. It formerly operated at Ratanga Junction in Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa from 1998 to 1 May 2018.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Brown track and supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and brown supports at Ratanga Junction.

fullText:
Silver Mountain is a steel roller coaster located at Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France. It formerly operated at Ratanga Junction in Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa from 1998 to 1 May 2018.



Brown track and supports. The ride used to feature yellow track and brown supports at Ratanga Junction.
